## 📝 Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes. Is this a new write-up, a technical correction, or a formatting fix?

## 🛡️ SOC Analysis Checklist
- [ ] **Lab Name:** Have you included the correct LetsDefend ID/Name?
- [ ] **Verdict:** Is the final verdict (True Positive / False Positive) clearly stated?
- [ ] **Artifacts:** Are all IOCs (IPs, Hashes, Domains) listed?
- [ ] **Screenshots:** Are all images uploaded to the `SOC/Assets` folder and correctly linked?
- [ ] **Methodology:** Does the write-up explain the *process*, not just the answers?

## 🔗 Related Issue
Fixes # (issue number)

## 📸 Evidence (Optional)
If this is a new write-up, feel free to add a screenshot of your completed lab badge or the "Case Closed" screen from LetsDefend.

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] I have checked that all Markdown links work.
- [ ] I have verified the technical accuracy of the investigation steps.
